title: pyrus fastigiata
intro: Pyrus fastigiata, also known as the vase-shaped pear or narrow-leaved pear, is a deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is valued for its ornamental and medicinal properties, with its bark and leaves being used in traditional medicine. The bark of Pyrus fastigiata has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. Herbal preparations of Pyrus fastigiata, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system.
